analysis.object: T674: Quantum Information and Entropy depth analysis

von_neumann_entropy.description: Von Neumann entropy S=-Tr(rho*log(rho)): EML-2 measurement of EML-inf quantum state
von_neumann_entropy.reason: Von Neumann entropy is EML-2: scalar measurement shadow of EML-inf density matrix

mutual_information.description: Quantum mutual information: EML-2 measurement of EML-inf correlations
mutual_information.reason: Mutual information is EML-2 shadow: measures correlation without accessing underlying EML-inf entanglement

channel_capacity.description: Quantum channel capacity: EML-2 measurement bound on EML-3 information transmission
channel_capacity.reason: Channel capacity is EML-2: maximum EML-2 rate of EML-3 quantum signal transmission

entanglement_entropy.description: Entanglement entropy of bipartite system: EML-2 shadow of EML-inf entanglement
entanglement_entropy.reason: Entanglement entropy is EML-2 shadow: scalar measure of EML-inf bipartite quantum correlation
